title: versioning — subscribed events
description: Versioning listens to foundation lifecycle events (warm + reload registries) + webhook subscription creation/update (validate the api_version FK). Does NOT listen to its own events — those flow downstream.

listeners.purpose: Synchronously loads ApiVersionRegistry + PayloadTransformerRegistry from cache (or rebuilds from DB + compiler artefact when cold). Runs in boot phase so first inbound request never sees a cold cache.
Rebuild registries when config hot-reloads. Synchronous — reload contract requires downstream registries fresh before signal returns.

When a module boots, walk its declared classes for #[AsPayloadTransformer] attributes + register them with PayloadTransformerRegistry. Complements the build-time compiler for dev-mode hot module loading.
Refuses creation of a WebhookSubscription whose api_version references an unknown or sunset ApiVersion. Emits NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL_INVALID_API_VERSION (namespaced error) on refusal.
